zh.lifeSummary: 當ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson於1673年4月3日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾布利德林頓時，她的父親Thomas Anderson36歲，母親Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox41歲。她於大約1700年與Giles Chapman Sr.在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她於1673年住在英國越可爾約克。她去世於1733年6月15日在英國英格蘭越可爾布利德林頓享年60歲，埋葬在英國越可爾布利德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson于1673年4月3日出生在英国英格兰越可爾布利德林頓时，她的父亲Thomas Anderson36岁，母亲Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox41岁。她于大约1700年与Giles Chapman Sr.在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她于1673年住在英国越可爾約克。她去世于1733年6月15日在英国英格兰越可爾布利德林頓享年60岁，埋葬在英国越可爾布利德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Anderson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic from the personal name Ander(s), a northern Middle English form of Andrew , + son ‘son’. The frequency of the surname in Scotland is attributable, at least in part, to the fact that Saint Andrew is the patron saint of Scotland, so the personal name has long enjoyed great popularity there. Legend has it that the saint's relics were taken to Scotland in the 4th century by a certain Saint Regulus. In North America, this surname has absorbed many cognate or like-sounding surnames in other languages, notably Scandinavian (see 3 and 4 below), but also Ukrainian Andreychenko etc.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Anders  , hence a cognate of 1 above.
Americanized form (and a less common Swedish variant) of Swedish   Andersson  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Winkle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Winkel  .

English (Staffordshire): habitational name from Wincle (Cheshire) or possibly from Winkhill in Waterfall (Staffordshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English wincel ‘nook, corner’, though the Cheshire placename may alternatively derive from Old English wince ‘sharp bend in a river, corner’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Winkel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Gerhardt, Aloysius, Bernd, Erwin, Gerd, Horst, Kurt, Math, Philo, Theodor.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived on a piece of land enclosed by woods or rivers or on a street corner in a town or city, from Middle High German winkel, German Winkel ‘corner’. In time this word also came to denote a corner shop (see Winkelmann , Winkler ). This surname is also found in Denmark, Poland, and France (mainly Lorraine).
German: habitational name from any of various places called Winkel.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson was born on 3 April 1673, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Anderson, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox, was 41. She married Giles Chapman Sr. about 1700, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She lived in York, Yorkshire, England in 1673. She died on 15 June 1733, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson est née le 3 avril 1673, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Anderson, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Giles Chapman Sr. environ 1700, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle a vécu à York, Everwyck, Angleterre en 1673. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1733, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson am 3. April 1673 in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Anderson 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox 41. Sie hat um 1700 in England, United Kingdom Giles Chapman Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1673 hat sie in York, Yorkshire, England gelebt. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1733 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson è nata il il 3 aprile 1673 nel Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Anderson, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Giles Chapman Sr. circa 1700, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Vissuto a York, Yorkshire, England nel 1673. ja.lifeSummary: ElizabethVan Winkle Andersonが1673年4月3日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Andersonは36歳，母Elizabeth Van Winkle Foxは41歳であった。約1700年にイギリスイギリスでGiles Chapman Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1673年にはイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークに住んでいた。彼女は1733年6月15日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンで60歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson(이)가 1673년 4월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Anderson(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1700년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Giles Chapman Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1673년도에 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 살았다. 그녀는 1733년 6월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 브리들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson nasceu em 3 de abril de 1673, em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Anderson, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Giles Chapman Sr. aproximadamente 1700, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela viveu em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra em 1673. Ela faleceu em 15 de junho de 1733, em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson родилась 3 апреля 1673 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Anderson было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Giles Chapman Sr. около 1700 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она жила в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в 1673 году. Она умерла 15 июня 1733 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson nació el 3 de abril de 1673, en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Anderson, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Van Winkle Fox, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Giles Chapman Sr. aproximadamente 1700, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Vivió en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra en 1673. Murió el 15 de junio de 1733, en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
